meta.description: Research datasets, tools, and publications relevant to 8gent Jr and neurodivergent AAC development

resources.name: Psychiatric Genomics Consortium — Full GWAS Dataset
resources.load_example:
from datasets import load_dataset
ds = load_dataset('OpenMed/pgc-schizophrenia', 'scz2022')
resources.relevance_to_8gentjr: ADHD and Autism are primary user populations for AAC tools. GWAS data may inform feature prioritization, symptom clustering, and evidence-based vocabulary selection.
resources.notes: Convert from Figshare/university servers to clean Parquet. Full attribution required per CC BY 4.0.
